scripts.clean:ports: powershell -NoProfile -Command "foreach ($p in 3000,3001,4000) { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq '' -and $_.StartTime -gt (Get-Date).AddMinutes(-30) } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter be build && pnpm --filter fe build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter fe exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter be exec tsc --noEmit && vitest run
